sql_array: CREATE TABLE ldap_entries (id INT PRIMARY KEY, dn VARCHAR(255), mail VARCHAR(255), telephoneNumber VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO ldap_entries (id, dn, mail, telephoneNumber) VALUES (1, 'cn=John Doe, o=opl, c=BG', 'john.doe@example.com', '123-456-7890');
INSERT INTO ldap_entries (id, dn, mail, telephoneNumber) VALUES (2, 'cn=Jane Doe, o=opl, c=BG', 'jane.doe@example.com', '234-567-8901');
INSERT INTO ldap_entries (id, dn, mail, telephoneNumber) VALUES (3, 'cn=Test User, o=opl, c=BG', '', NULL);
SELECT * FROM ldap_entries WHERE id > 0 AND bif:contains(dn, 'John') AND mail IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, dn, bif:contains(dn, concat('cn=', 'John Doe')) AS contains FROM ldap_entries WHERE telephoneNumber IS NOT NULL;

CREATE PROCEDURE sam_ldap_modify (IN s1 VARCHAR, IN s2 VARCHAR) BEGIN DECLARE res ANY; DECLARE vec ANY; DECLARE _from_modify INTEGER; vec := vector('dn', concat('cn=', s1, ' ', s2, ', o=opl, c=BG'), 'mail', vector('new_mail@techno-link.com'), 'telephoneNumber', vector('123-45-00')); _from_modify := ldap_modify('ldap://localhost:389', 0, vec, NULL); RETURN (_from_modify); END;
SELECT (SELECT sam_ldap_modify('New', 'Name') FROM dual) AS modification_status WHERE bif:contains((SELECT mail FROM ldap_entries WHERE id = 1), 'example') IS TRUE;
SELECT dn, mail FROM ldap_entries WHERE bif:contains(NULLIF(mail, ''), 'example') OR mail IS NULL;
SELECT id, dn FROM ldap_entries WHERE dn IN (SELECT DISTINCT dn FROM ldap_entries WHERE bif:contains(dn, 'User')) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(telephoneNumber) > 0;
ALTER TABLE ldap_entries ADD COLUMN new_column VARCHAR(50);

INSERT INTO ldap_entries (id, dn, mail, telephoneNumber, new_column) VALUES (4, 'cn=Boundary Test, o=opl, c=BG', 'boundary@example.com', '000-000-0000', 'max_value') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE new_column = 'updated_value';
